[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1101110010 6
1 0001110011 5
2 0001010010 3
3 0111001110 6
4 0111101110 7
5 0000101001 3
6 0000000000 a
7 0000001011 3
